NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFERENCE;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGELLENNER, LORALYN I HEARING SET FOR MAR-30-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-30-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE WAS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/17/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 7/7/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT STIPULATED TO. THE PARTIES FRUTHER STIPULATED TO SHORTENED TIME REGARDING SUMMARY JUDGMENT SET FORTH IN G.O. 140. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 5/19/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE, BY FAX, AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE OUTSTANDING AUTHORIZATIONS AND PATHOLOGY TO BERRY & BERRY BY 4/10/06. PATHOLOGY TO BE MADE AVAILABLE TO DEFENDANTS BY 4/28/06. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/JIROQUE; REPORTER: JANET POND #5292 (206)
